description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish backpack from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBrown handbagHas one handle to use as a hand bag and two shoulder straps to convert it into a backpackA flap in front with press buttoned closure and a buckled detailOne main compartment with a draw string tie running through eyelets for closure and internal zippered compartment insideOne small compartment in front with a Velcro closureOne zippered compartment at the backMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 37 cmWidth: 41 cmDepth: 20 cm
